title: Better Multiplayer Sleep
description: Allows one person to sleep through the night, which can be cancelled by others in the server.
body:
# Better Multiplayer Sleep

A mod/datapack for **servers** to only require one player to sleep through the night. This is cancellable by other players if they disagree with skipping the night.

## Showcase

![showcase1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/834561dc0d859736bfc37a27b985b9674f115f83.png)

Text shown when a player is trying to skip the night.

Upon clicking the [**Cancel**] text, the player's sleep will be interrupted and they will be kicked out of the bed.
#

### Tip
Since datapacks have their own limitations, the message below will be shown upon clicking the text.

![tip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9eb0dccfebe8897d856db6d9b553fcb1734a5632.png)

If u wish to disable it, just do ```/gamerule sendCommandFeedback false``` and the text will be hidden.

_note: versions lower than 1.19 may work but are untested._
